input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.8.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.8.5
            TITLE: each attachment point requires no less than two 8 mm or 5/16” minimum diameter critical

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.8.5: Each attachment point requires no less than two 8 mm or 5/16” minimum diameter Critical
F.7.8.5 Each attachment point requires no less than two 8 mm or 5/16” minimum diameter Critical 
Fasteners, see T.8.2

final_answer: F.7.8.5 Each attachment point requires no less than two 8 mm or 5/16” minimum diameter Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
